untranslatable_reason: The Asymmetrical Broadening Wedge (ABW) pattern requires geometric shape detection (dual expanding trendlines with asymmetrical slopes) which cannot be expressed using only price-level and technical indicators. The pattern identification itself, market regime context switching (bull vs bear), and direction-dependent entry logic require custom pattern recognition beyond the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Approximated using Donchian breakouts as a proxy for wedge pattern identification. True ABW pattern requires: (1) visual/geometric wedge detection with expanding upper and lower boundaries, (2) dynamic market regime classification (bull/bear), (3) conditional logic based on breakout direction vs market regime. Hold period set to 161 days (max from source). Stop loss set conservatively at 5% (between cited failure rates of 10-11%). Entry/exit conditions are simplified proxies only.
